creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Mangin from comment #6)

Cool. Unfortunately, upstream hasn't published their repository and doesn't seem to have any bug reporting mechanism available, so I guess we'll just keep these changes as local patches. Cover art updating could use some looking into, as well.

Thanks for taking this and lighting a fire under my nether regions, fuz, but I'm assigning this bug to myself since I started it.
